content:
When designing a website for your small business, consider making the navigation simple and intuitive. A clear menu structure helps users find what they need quickly, which is crucial in retaining local customers who might be browsing on-the-go. This not only enhances user experience but also boosts engagement and can lead to more conversions.

Why does this matter? In a busy town, potential clients value efficiency; if your website is easy to navigate, you're likely keeping them engaged long enough to explore what you offer fully.

How’s the navigation on your site?
